title: Loner with the Worst Skills
overview: Haruka is suddenly summoned to another world along with his classmates where special skills are first come, first served. He gets the skill "loner."

title: Reunion
overview: Haruka overhears delinquents misusing their skills.

title: Life with the Girls
overview: Life together with rambunctious girls is a little awkward.

title: Headed to Town
overview: Haruka encounters the jocks. They tell him how they've kept an eye on the delinquents and that someone has a terrifying OP skill called "Hijack."

title: Life in Town
overview: After arriving in the town of Omui, the group heads for the Adventurers Guild. Haruka, however, is not a high enough level.

title: Alone Again
overview: After saving Merielle, Haruka is paid a handsome sum and granted ID which allows him to freely leave town.

title: Haruka and the Hooded Man
overview: Tanaka reveals his true evil side. It's all Haruka can do just to avoid getting hit, and things are starting to look bad.

title: Dungeon Expedition
overview: His classmates are adjusting well to their new lives as adventurers, but Haruka still wants to get back to his life alone in the woods.

title: The Loner and the Dungeon Emperor
overview: The last boss, the Dungeon Emperor, awaits Haruka in the deepest depths of the dungeon.

title: Stampede
overview: While Haruka and Angelica are conquering the labyrinth from the bottom to the top, Meliere appears in front of the committee chairman and the others who are progressing from the top to the bottom. Then, she learns of the fact that the threat of a stampede is approaching the city of Omui, and how to stop it.

title: Escape from the Dungeon
overview: After getting word about the stampede headed for town, Haruka makes haste in escaping the dungeon.

title: Loner & Loner
overview: After stopping the stampede, Haruka and her friends return to Omui town. The girls in the class go to the bathroom together to get closer to Angelica, but when they take off their armor, they find a bare leg for some reason...
